name: PayStream
product: B2B payment orchestration platform with real-time settlement
pricing_tier: Volume-based: 0.15% per transaction; Enterprise flat fee from $5000/mo
value_proposition: Accept, route, and settle B2B payments across 30+ providers with a single API — reducing payment costs by 40% and settlement time from T+2 to real-time

competitors.name: Stripe
competitors.weakness: Consumer-focused; limited B2B payment method support; high fees for large transfers

competitors.name: Adyen
competitors.weakness: Long onboarding (3-6 months); requires high minimum volumes; enterprise-only support

competitors.name: Traxpay
competitors.weakness: Limited to European market; smaller integration ecosystem

target.segment: Mid-market B2B companies, marketplace platforms, and payment service providers
target.decision_maker: CFO / Head of Payments / Finance Director
pain_points: Managing multiple payment providers is operationally complex
High payment processing fees eating margins
Slow settlement cycles creating cash flow problems
Cross-border payments are expensive and opaque
Compliance with PSD2, PCI DSS, and local regulations

differentiators: Single API for 30+ payment providers — no vendor lock-in
Real-time settlement vs. industry standard T+2
40% lower fees through intelligent payment routing
Full PSD2 and PCI DSS Level 1 compliance built-in
Polish-founded with deep CEE market expertise
White-label solution for PSPs and banks

case_studies.result: Reduced payment processing costs by 42%; settlement time from 2 days to instant
Unified 8 payment providers into one platform; 60% reduction in payment ops workload
Achieved PCI DSS Level 1 compliance in 6 weeks; passed regulatory audit on first attempt
